mapper.sql: id, request_id AS requestId, order_id AS orderId, customer_id AS customerId, old_address AS oldAddress, old_lng AS oldLng, old_lat AS oldLat, new_address AS newAddress, new_lng AS newLng, new_lat AS newLat, contact_name AS contactName, contact_phone AS contactPhone, reason, status, impact_level AS impactLevel, extra_distance_km AS extraDistanceKm, estimated_delay_minutes AS estimatedDelayMinutes, extra_cost AS extraCost, need_dispatcher_review AS needDispatcherReview, need_driver_confirm AS needDriverConfirm, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address_change_requests ( request_id, order_id, customer_id, old_address, old_lng, old_lat, new_address, new_lng, new_lat, contact_name, contact_phone, reason, status, impact_level, extra_distance_km, estimated_delay_minutes, extra_cost, need_dispatcher_review, need_driver_confirm, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{orderId}, #{customerId}, #{oldAddress}, #{oldLng}, #{oldLat}, #{newAddress}, #{newLng}, #{newLat}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{impactLevel}, #{extraDistanceKm}, #{estimatedDelayMinutes}, #{extraCost}, #{needDispatcherReview}, #{needDriverConfirm}, now(), now() )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM address_change_requests WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, request_id AS requestId, operator_id AS operatorId, operator_role AS operatorRole, action, remark, created_at AS createdAt FROM address_change_logs WHERE request_id = #{requestId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE address_change_requests SET status = #{status}, updated_at = now() WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO driver_ratings ( rating_id, order_id, customer_id, driver_id, plate, score, punctuality, service_attitude, cargo_integrity, communication, comment, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{ratingId}, #{orderId}, #{customerId}, #{driverId}, #{plate}, #{score}, #{punctuality}, #{serviceAttitude}, #{cargoIntegrity}, #{communication}, #{comment}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, rating_id AS ratingId, order_id AS orderId, customer_id AS customerId, driver_id AS driverId, plate, score, punctuality, service_attitude AS serviceAttitude, cargo_integrity AS cargoIntegrity, communication, comment, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM driver_ratings WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT id, rating_id AS ratingId, tag_name AS tagName FROM driver_rating_tags WHERE rating_id = #{ratingId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT driver_id AS "driverId", ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric, 2) AS "averageScore", COUNT(1) AS "ratingCount", ROUND(AVG(punctuality)::numeric, 2) AS punctuality, ROUND(AVG(service_attitude)::numeric, 2) AS "serviceAttitude", ROUND(AVG(cargo_integrity)::numeric, 2) AS "cargoIntegrity", ROUND(AVG(communication)::numeric, 2) AS communication FROM driver_ratings WHERE driver_id = #{driverId} GROUP BY driver_id

SELECT t.tag_name AS name, COUNT(1) AS count FROM driver_rating_tags t JOIN driver_ratings r ON r.rating_id = t.rating_id WHERE r.driver_id = #{driverId} GROUP BY t.tag_name ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC, t.tag_name ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT id, rating_id AS ratingId, order_id AS orderId, customer_id AS customerId, driver_id AS driverId, plate, score, punctuality, service_attitude AS serviceAttitude, cargo_integrity AS cargoIntegrity, communication, comment, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM driver_ratings WHERE driver_id = #{driverId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO unload_address_records ( record_id, order_id, record_type, address, lng, lat, abnormal_type, description, photos, remark, operator_id, operator_role, created_at ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{orderId}, #{recordType}, #{address}, #{lng}, #{lat}, #{abnormalType}, #{description}, #{photos}, #{remark}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorRole}, now() )
mapper.select: SELECT alert_type AS type, title, status, triggered_at AS "occurredAt", resolved_at AS "handledAt", severity, summary FROM alerts WHERE cargo_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY triggered_at DESC LIMIT 20
